nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Every 15 min. The brain of the AI Sales Agent. Per client-with-agent-enabled: pulls pending behavioral_triggers + agent_personalities + agent_schedules + recent agent_actions, builds Claude context, asks Claude (Sonnet 4.5) what to do for each lead, writes to agent_decisions, calls action_executor (C2). Respects quiet hours, daily caps, per-lead-per-week caps. Universal multi-vertical — Claude tunes message via personality.vertical_context.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; const ctx = $('Parse Decision').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, decision_id: row && row.id, action_type: ctx.action_type, channel: ctx.channel, message: ctx.message, lead_id: ctx.lead_id, client_id: ctx.client_id, trigger_id: ctx.trigger_id }); })() }}
